status: preliminary — Opus matrix complete; no independent property-level gold, review-to-issue timing, or audio ablation

comparison_basis.gemini: End-to-end automatic segmentation for V0/V1; capture-time room groups for P2+; Gemini 3.5 Flash description; detection and PDF disabled.
comparison_basis.opus_controlled: The original Gemini automatic segmentation is frozen for V0/V1 so only the description model changes; Claude Opus 4.8 description; detection and PDF disabled.
comparison_basis.opus_manual_structure_upper_bound: V1 is also run against a manually audited 12-segment/10-room structure. This is an upper-bound diagnostic, not a backend-only comparison with automatic V1 Gemini.
comparison_basis.proxy_accuracy: Existing human-reviewed report/inventory.json, nine rooms and 179 items. It is not independent gold and omits Loft Office; use only for directional comparison. The current run_eval.py defect denominator includes only matched gold items, so defect recall is conditional rather than whole-property recall.

V0_gemini.structure_note: Loft Office was omitted and folded into the loft schedule.

V1_gemini.structure_note: Introduced a false Bedroom 2, used Loft Room rather than Loft Office, and visibly bled en-suite/bedroom evidence across schedules. Spoken room names were not consumed because the pipeline has no audio path.

P2plus_gemini.structure_note: Room structure is correct by capture-time labelling. This is P2+, not the predeclared roughly-80-photo P2 arm. The current hero scorer often selected detail photos rather than establishing views.

V1_opus_controlled.status: complete — original Gemini automatic segments frozen
V1_opus_controlled.structure_note: Preserves Gemini's false Bedroom 2, Loft Room label and 20-fragment/11-room schedule; valid backend-only comparison with V1_gemini.

V1_opus_manual_structure_upper_bound.structure_note: Diagnostic upper bound with the false Bedroom 2 removed and Loft Office restored; not a backend-only comparison with automatic V1 Gemini.

P2plus_opus.structure_note: Room structure is supplied by capture-time labels. This remains P2+, not the predeclared roughly-80-photo P2 arm.

decision: No default switch on Property A alone. V1 does not meet the predeclared whole-journey criterion; P2+ proves the structural and resolution advantage of labelled photos but not the standard P2 effort/quality trade-off. Build independent gold and measure review-to-issue burden before the checkpoint can close.
